results.title: Topolines: Generate Topologic contours
results.content:
Promoted

Alexis Oulès

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 I built Topolines to solve a recurring friction in my own design workflow: generating clean, vector-based topographic contour maps without opening heavy 3D software or manual vector tools. With Topolines, you can dynamically tweak elevation density, noise, line weights, and colors, then export clean SVG or HD PNG files ready for Figma, web projects, or print. Give it a try and let me know what you think! I'm around all day to answer your questions and take feature requests. 🙌 [...] Subscribe

# TopolinesAlternatives

Exploring Topologic contours with Topolines? Check out MapMagic for collaborative route planning, AvoMap to wow crowds with animated 3D maps, mult.dev for cinematic travel visualizations, and MagicPattern to style outputs fast. Even AutoDraw speeds up sketching ideas.
